SEARCH
Package model

Class Session

java.lang.Object
model.Session
public class Session extends Object
A class used to stores information about the current user session in the Photos app.

This class tracks:

  • The username of the logged in user
  • Whether the user is the admin account
  • The name of the current opened album
  • The current selected photo

All of the fields and methods are static, since there is only one active session at a time. When the user logs out, clear() resets the session state.

Author:
Craig Hymowitz

  • Method Details

    • setCurrentUser

      public static void setCurrentUser(String user)
      Sets the current user for the session and determines if the user is the admin.
      Parameters:
      user - the username of the logging in user

    • getUsername

      public static String getUsername()
      Returns the username of the currently logged in user.
      Returns:
      the username

    • isAdmin

      public static boolean isAdmin()
      Returns whether or not the current session belongs to the admin user.
      Returns:
      true if current user is admin, otherwise false

    • setCurrentAlbumName

      public static void setCurrentAlbumName(String albumName)
      Sets the name of the album currently being viewed.
      Parameters:
      albumName - the current album name

    • getCurrentAlbumName

      public static String getCurrentAlbumName()
      Returns the name of the currently opened album.
      Returns:
      the album name, or null if none is open

    • setCurrentPhoto

      public static void setCurrentPhoto(Photo p)
      Sets the currently selected photo.
      Parameters:
      p - the current photo

    • getCurrentPhoto

      public static Photo getCurrentPhoto()
      Returns the currently selected photo.
      Returns:
      the current photo, or null if none selected

    • clear

      public static void clear()
      Clears all session data. Called on logout.
